languages.text: "Ты говорил, что Нунциус находится между жизнью и смертью — что случилось?"
"You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"
languages.original_text: "Ты говорил, что Нунциус находится между жизнью и смертью — что случилось?"

traits.locale_text: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"
"You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"
"You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"

languages.text: «Ha dicho que Nuncius estaba entre la vida y la muerte. ¿Qué pasó?».
languages.original_text: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"

traits.locale_text: «Ha dicho que Nuncius estaba entre la vida y la muerte. ¿Qué pasó?».

languages.text: “你说努恩修斯求生不得，求死不能。这是怎么回事？”
languages.original_text: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"

traits.locale_text: “你说努恩修斯求生不得，求死不能。这是怎么回事？”

languages.text: « Vous avez dit que Nuncius était entre la vie et la mort. Comment est-ce arrivé ? »
languages.original_text: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez dit que Nuncius était entre la vie et la mort. Comment est-ce arrivé ? »

languages.text: "Nuncius'un yaşamla ölüm arasında olduğunu söyledin. Ne oldu?"
languages.original_text: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'un yaşamla ölüm arasında olduğunu söyledin. Ne oldu?"

languages.text: "Ihr habt gesagt, Nuncius war zwischen Leben und Tod gefangen — was ist passiert?"
languages.original_text: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt gesagt, Nuncius war zwischen Leben und Tod gefangen — was ist passiert?"

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスは生死の境をさまよったと言ったが、何があった？」
languages.original_text: "You said that Nuncius was between life and death — what happened?"

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスは生死の境をさまよったと言ったが、何があった？」
